{{Quote|I am a Jedi Knight, one of the last of our breed.|Morvet Storm|<ref name="LJAGB" />}}
'''Morvet Storm''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He was a survivor of [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|Contingency]] [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], a [[Treason/Legends|treasonous]] order designed to wipe out the Jedi, Storm hid from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for two years until being hunted down and slain by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].

==Biography==
Morvet Storm was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], and constructed an orange-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. Storm eventually became a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], and honed his ability of [[Farsight/Legends|Farsight]], developing acute accuracy at divining future events. Among his visions, he foresaw the name of his unborn grandson, '[[Havet Storm]]'. At some point during his career, Storm violated the bylaws of the Order and began a family without the permission or knowledge of the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]. Fathering a child, Storm hid this from the rest of the Order or risk being expelled from its ranks. Jedi Storm's involvement is unknown, however, it is known that he managed to escape the execution of Contingency Order 66 and the start of the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] that heralded the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="LJAGB" />

A fugitive during the early days of the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], Storm and his family went into hiding, traveling from planet to planet to avoid being found by the Empire. During the constant moving, Storm took the time to record a message for his unborn grandson Havet and stored it in the memory banks of his personal [[K-9 series hunting-and-tracking droid|K-9]] series droid called [[Arf (K-9 droid)|Arf]]. In the message he explained to his future grandchild that he was a Jedi and that Havet had within him the potential to become one too. Storm also hid within the droid his old lightsaber, a gift for his grandson should he ever need it. As Storm ended the message, the Empire attacked his location, led by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] himself. As the recording continued, Storm could be heard to cry "''Vader! Has it finally come to this?''" As Storm was slain after a brief duel with the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]], he left his grandson with a brief warning: "''Havet… the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]… the death of all Jedi. Never reveal… never…''"<ref name="LJAGB" />

==Legacy==
Storm's grandson eventually received his grandfather's gifts and, thanks to the insight and guidance Storm had provided through the audio recording, Havet joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] against the Empire and successfully stole the technical specifications to the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star's]] [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]]. Thus Storm's legacy lived on.<ref name="LJAGB" />
